arts.ttl: Man City hijack Real Madrid bid for ‘Bellingham of defenders’ after Alexander-Arnold warning
arts.sum: Manchester City have joined a three-way fight to secure the future of a player Real Madrid consider to be the ‘Jude Bellingham of defenders’, according to a report from Spain. Man City hijack Real Madrid bid for ‘Bellingham of defenders’ after Alexander-Arnold warning

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka set to make Arsenal return after long injury lay-off
arts.sum: Saka has not featured since December after hamstring surgery

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid and Real Madrid monitoring defender wanted by Liverpool
arts.sum: The form of Bournemouth this season has caught the eye across Europe, and it is no surprise that in addition to manager Andoni Iraola, the top sides on the continent are wondering if some of their star players could make the jump to Champions League football. arts.ttl: Man Utd's two reasons for selling Bruno Fernandes to Real Madrid amid stark new reality
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe is a cold-blooded businessman and, with Manchester United in a mess financially, the billionaire co-owner wouldn't hesitate to sell Bruno Fernandes this summer

arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 3-2 win vs Leganes
arts.sum: Leganes have lost nearly half of their 29 La Liga games this season, but against Real Madrid, they looked like a team battling for Europe. Leganes have made Atletico Madrid and Barcelona drop points this season, but they are not a good team.
